name: Treatment Administration and Longitudinal Monitoring
preprompt: Lay out the day-to-day treatment procedures after assignment, including ad libitum feeding, cage-level diet replacement schedule, body weight tracking, food intake or consumption checks if used, and routine welfare assessments. Define how treatment adherence, deviations, intercurrent illness, and supportive care are recorded.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. Write: own data only.
summary: Implements the intervention and tracks animal status over the course of the lifespan study.
